title: Max Fashion Holdings Services is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Max Fashion Holdings Services is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Max Fashion Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Max Fashion Holdings Services:
Max Fashion Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Fashion Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
